name: semantic_graph
invariants: output.ok === false || output.nodes.every(n => typeof n.id === 'string' && typeof n.label === 'string')
output.ok === false || output.edges.every(e => typeof e.source === 'string' && typeof e.target === 'string')
_note: Resonance graph for GraphView. Nodes = top hits; edges by shared work/author. Empty corpus → empty nodes/edges, never an error.
